hyperedges.label: Components consuming useI18n for localized rendering
Multi-step lead form submission flow to Google Apps Script
Trilingual Dictionary System
hyperedges.description: fa, en, and ar dictionaries all share the same Dictionary shape and are aggregated by the index module into a locale-keyed map consumed at runtime.

hyperedges.label: Form Validation + i18n Integration
hyperedges.description: getStepSchemas accepts FormErrors sourced from the active i18n dictionary and returns Zod schemas consumed by LeadForm, tying validation, localization, and form rendering together.

hyperedges.label: Single-Page Section Composition
hyperedges.description: The Home page composes all section components sequentially to produce the full one-page portfolio site.

nodes.label: Website Goal: Convert Skeptical Visitor to Lead
nodes.norm_label: website goal: convert skeptical visitor to lead

nodes.label: Target Audience: Iranian Small Business Owners
nodes.norm_label: target audience: iranian small business owners

nodes.label: RTL-Native Design (Right-to-Left)
nodes.rationale: Persian is not a cosmetic switch — typography, spacing, hierarchy, and copy rhythm are built for RTL reading from the ground up, not CSS mirroring of LTR layout.

nodes.label: Accessibility: WCAG AA, RTL, Reduced Motion
nodes.norm_label: accessibility: wcag aa, rtl, reduced motion

nodes.label: Anti-References (Design Avoidances)
nodes.rationale: Avoid generic Persian web-dev dark blue/teal templates, Upwork/Fiverr contractor aesthetics, SaaS-cream AI scaffolding, and over-polished Western agency sites that feel foreign to Iranian SMB market.
